summary: Iteration 8: Complete testing of Venue Portal (Luna Group VIP Dashboard). All features tested and working. Login, Dashboard Overview, QR Scanner, Users, Revenue, Auctions, Points, Activity pages all render correctly with proper data. Navigation between sections works. Logout functionality works. Mobile responsiveness excellent.
critical_code_review_comments: Venue Portal is well-implemented with clean code structure
All navigation items have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Dark theme with red (#E31837) and gold (#FFD700) accents matches Luna Group branding
Responsive design works correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports
QR Scanner camera access may not work in automation (expected behavior)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue Portal at /api/venue-portal is fully functional. Login with venue@eclipse.com/venue123. All 7 sections (Overview, QR Scanner, Users, Revenue, Auctions, Points, Activity) work correctly. All analytics data is MOCKED. Mobile responsive navigation works with hamburger menu.

mocked_apis.details: All venue portal analytics data is mock data - Revenue analytics, User analytics, Auction analytics, Points analytics, Activity feed, VIP alerts, Top spenders are all using static mock data from mockData.ts

venue_portal_login.details: Login page renders with email/password fields, credentials venue@eclipse.com/venue123 work correctly

dashboard_overview.details: VIP Alerts, Stats cards (Revenue $155,500, Check-ins 2,340, Avg Spend $66.45, Active Auctions 3), Revenue Trend chart, Peak Hours heatmap, Live Activity feed, Top Spenders

qr_scanner.details: QR Code Scanner page renders with Check-in and Redemption buttons (camera requires permission)

users_analytics.details: Total Users 2,335, Active Today 847, Demographics charts (Age groups, Membership Tiers pie chart), Top Visitors table with Export

revenue_analytics.details: Total Revenue $155,500, Revenue Comparison line chart, This Week vs Last Week comparison, Best Day (Saturday), Peak Hour (11PM-12AM), Export button

auctions_analytics.details: Live Auctions (3), Total Bids (57), auction cards with current bids, time remaining, and status badges

points_analytics.details: Points Issued (45,600), Points Redeemed (32,400), Redemption Rate (71%), Points Distribution pie chart, Top Point Earners

activity_feed.details: Real-time Activity Feed with search input, Filter button, Export button, activity items with user avatars and tier badges

navigation.details: All nav items (nav-overview, nav-scanner, nav-users, nav-revenue, nav-auctions, nav-points, nav-activity) work correctly

logout.details: Logout button works, redirects to login page

mobile_responsiveness.details: Mobile menu (hamburger) works, all sections accessible via mobile nav, proper stacking of content on small screens
